assertions.description: hdmi_dvi_interfaces correctly identifies U2 (LT8912B) as bridge_ic and HDMI1 (HDMI-SWM-19) as hdmi_connector. RCLAMP0524P ESD arrays (U3/U4/U5) correctly detected as esd_ic protecting TMDS and HPD/I2C lines. Crystal Q1 (25MHz) detected with 27pF load caps.

The design has a MIPI-DSI1 FPC connector with DSI_CLKP/N and DSI_DATA0/1 P/N pairs routed to the LT8912B. The differential_pairs list is empty in both signal_analysis and design_analysis. These are clearly named differential pairs (P/N suffix) and should be detected.
